title: FMD - Both earbuds connected - Play button
scenario: Play tone on both connected earbuds via Find My Device and verify tone plays, UI states, and return to pre-play state after stopping.
steps: Open Lens app with Osprey device connected
Go to App Settings > Find My Device
expected: Osprey recognized on map; tone plays on both earbuds with flashing lights, "Sending tone..." message with animated stop button and illustration; after stop, state returns to pre-play state.
